products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Valve (NC / NO) - PCN Series
products.description: High-flow pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve available in normally closed and normally open configurations. Ideal for air, water, and light oil applications with reliable sealing and low power consumption.

products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Valve (Flange) - PCN Series
products.description: Flanged pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve designed for industrial piping systems requiring secure bolted connections. Suitable for higher pressure applications.

products.name: Semi Lift Diaphragm Operated Solenoid Valve (NC / NO) - MCN Series
products.description: Semi-lift diaphragm operated solenoid valve combining direct-acting and pilot-operated principles for versatile flow control in demanding applications.

products.name: Pilot Operated Piston Type Steam Valve (NC / NO) - HCP Series
products.description: Heavy-duty piston operated solenoid valve designed specifically for steam applications. Handles high temperatures and pressures in industrial environments with robust construction.

products.name: Gas Solenoid Valve - UGS Series
products.description: Specialized gas solenoid valve certified for natural gas, LPG, and other gaseous media. Meets international safety standards with leak-proof design and reliable operation.

products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Type Solenoid Valve (NC) - PBN Series
products.description: Normally closed pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve for general purpose industrial applications. Compact design with reliable sealing and quick response.

products.name: 2/2 Way Direct Acting Valve (NC / NO) - DAS Series
products.description: Compact direct acting 2/2 way solenoid valve available in NC and NO configurations. Suitable for low flow applications with fast response time and zero differential pressure operation.

products.name: 3/2 Way Direct Acting Valve (NC / NO) - DAS Series
products.description: Versatile direct acting 3/2 way solenoid valve for directional control. Available in universal, normally closed, and normally open configurations.

products.name: 3/2 Way Direct Acting Valve (NC / NO) - DAC Series
products.description: Direct acting 3/2 way solenoid valve with compact footprint for space-constrained applications. Suitable for air and inert gas applications.

products.name: 2/2 Solenoid Valve For Terminal / Gantry Automation (NC / NO) - DAR Series
products.description: Specialized solenoid valve designed for terminal and gantry automation systems. Reliable performance in fuel dispensing and transfer applications.

products.name: Semi Lift Diaphragm Operated Plastic Solenoid Valve (NC) - MNN Series
products.description: Corrosion-resistant plastic solenoid valve with semi-lift diaphragm operation. Ideal for chemical handling and aggressive media applications.

products.name: High Pressure Pilot Operated Diaphragm Type Solenoid Valve (NC / NO) - PBU Series
products.description: High pressure pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve rated for demanding hydraulic and pneumatic systems. Robust construction for heavy industrial use.

products.name: Auto Drain Valve With Filter Ball Valve (NC)
products.description: Automatic drain valve with integrated filter ball valve for removing condensate from compressed air systems. Maintains system efficiency without manual intervention.

products.name: 2/2 Way Direct Acting Auto Drain Solenoid Valve (NC)
products.description: Direct acting auto drain solenoid valve for automatic condensate removal in compressed air systems. Timer-controlled or level-sensing operation.

products.name: 2/2 Way Pilot Operated High Flow Auto Drain Solenoid Valve (NC)
products.description: High flow pilot operated auto drain valve for large capacity compressed air systems. Handles high volumes of condensate with reliable automatic operation.

products.name: 2/2 Way Direct Acting Angle Type Valve (NC) - DAA Series
products.description: Angle type direct acting solenoid valve with compact right-angle design for space-constrained installations. Suitable for air, water, and light oil.

products.name: 3 Way Direct Acting Solenoid Valve (All Port In Body) - DAV Series
products.description: Three-way direct acting solenoid valve with all ports in the body for universal manifold mounting. Suitable for diverse flow control configurations.

products.name: 2/2 Direct Acting High Pressure Solenoid Valve (NC) - DHP Series
products.description: Direct acting high pressure solenoid valve for hydraulic and pneumatic systems up to 210 bar. Rugged construction for demanding high-pressure applications.

products.name: 2 Way Direct Acting Media Separated Solenoid Valve (NC)
products.description: Media separated solenoid valve with isolation diaphragm for handling aggressive or corrosive fluids. Protects coil and internal components from media contact.

products.name: Pinch Type Solenoid Valve (NC / NO)
products.description: Pinch type solenoid valve that uses a pinching mechanism to control flow through flexible tubing. Ideal for sterile applications and media containing particulates.

products.name: 3/2 Single Solenoid Valve With Spring Return (NC/NO) - DCC Series
products.description: Compact 3/2 way single solenoid pneumatic valve with spring return. Reliable directional control for industrial automation applications.

products.name: 5/2 Single Solenoid Valve With Spring Return - DCC Series
products.description: 5/2 way single solenoid pneumatic directional control valve with spring return. Suitable for double-acting cylinder actuation.

products.name: 5/3 Double Solenoid Valve With Spring Center - DCC Series
products.description: 5/3 way double solenoid pneumatic valve with spring-centered position. Provides precise control with all-ports-blocked centre position.

products.name: 3/2, 5/2 Single Solenoid Namur Valve With Spring Return - DCC Series
products.description: Namur mount single solenoid pneumatic valve with spring return for direct mounting on quarter-turn actuators. Standardized interface for easy installation.

products.name: 3/2 Hand Lever Valve Manual and Spring Return - DCC Series
products.description: Manual hand lever operated pneumatic valve with spring return for applications requiring manual control of pneumatic circuits.

products.name: 3/2 Single External Pilot Operated Valve With Spring Return (NC/NO) - DCC Series
products.description: External pilot operated pneumatic valve suitable for low-pressure or vacuum applications where internal pilot pressure is insufficient.

products.name: 5/2 Single Solenoid Valve With Spring Return - DCS Series
products.description: DCS series 5/2 way single solenoid pneumatic valve with spring return. Higher flow capacity for demanding pneumatic applications.

products.name: 5/3 Double Solenoid Valve With Spring Center - DCS Series
products.description: DCS series 5/3 way double solenoid pneumatic valve with spring-centered position. Robust construction for industrial environments.

products.name: OR Valve - SH Series
products.description: Pneumatic OR (shuttle) valve for selecting the higher of two input pressures. Used in safety circuits and alternative supply applications.

products.name: AND Valve - SH Series
products.description: Pneumatic AND (dual pressure) valve requiring both input signals for output. Used in interlock and safety control circuits.

products.name: Directional Control Valve Manifold
products.description: Modular manifold for directional control valves providing centralized air supply and exhaust. Reduces piping and simplifies pneumatic system installation.

products.name: Angle Seat Valve with Steel Actuator Operator (NC / NO) - YCP Series
products.description: Heavy-duty angle seat valve with steel actuator for steam, condensate, and high-viscosity fluids. Reliable sealing and long service life in demanding environments.

products.name: Angle Seat Valve with Plastic Actuator Operator (NC/NO/DA) - ACP Series
products.description: Cost-effective angle seat valve with plastic actuator for less demanding applications. Suitable for water, air, and light chemical media.

products.name: 3 Way Control Valve (NC / NO) - TCP Series
products.description: Three-way angle seat control valve for diverting or mixing flow streams. Suitable for temperature control and blending applications.

products.name: Double Acting Pneumatic Actuator - AD Series
products.description: Double acting rack and pinion pneumatic actuator for quarter-turn valve automation. High torque output with compact design for ball valve and butterfly valve operation.

products.name: Single Acting Pneumatic Actuator - AS Series
products.description: Spring return rack and pinion pneumatic actuator for fail-safe quarter-turn valve operation. Available in fail-open and fail-closed configurations.

products.name: 3 Piece Flange Ball Valve - JC Series
products.description: Three-piece flanged ball valve for easy maintenance and repair without removing from pipeline. Suitable for on-off and control applications in industrial piping systems.

products.name: Screwed / Socket Weld Ball Valve - JC Series
products.description: Compact screwed and socket weld ball valve for smaller diameter piping. Available in full bore and reduced bore configurations.

products.name: Gear Box Operated Lug Type Butterfly Valve - BL Series
products.description: Lug type butterfly valve with gearbox operator for precise throttling control. Suitable for dead-end service and isolation applications.

products.name: Pneumatic Operated Lug Type Butterfly Valve - PN10/16 - BL Series
products.description: Lug type butterfly valve with pneumatic actuator for automated on-off and modulating control in industrial processes.

products.name: Hand Lever Operated Wafer Type Butterfly Valve - BW Series
products.description: Economical wafer type butterfly valve with hand lever for general isolation and throttling services. Lightweight and easy to install between flanges.

products.name: Pneumatic Operated Wafer Type Butterfly Valve - PN10/16 - BW Series
products.description: Wafer type butterfly valve with pneumatic actuator for automated flow control. Compact design with high flow capacity.

products.name: Pneumatic Operated Wafer Type Butterfly Valve - PN10/16 - BM Series
products.description: BM series wafer butterfly valve with pneumatic actuator for demanding industrial applications. Enhanced sealing for bubble-tight shut-off.

products.name: Pulse Jet Angle Type Dust Collector Valve - JAN Series
products.description: Angle type pulse jet valve for dust collector filter cleaning systems. High flow and rapid response for efficient filter regeneration in cement, steel, and chemical plants.

products.name: External Pilot Operated Pulse Jet Angle Type Dust Collector Valve - EPS Series
products.description: External pilot operated pulse jet valve for high-pressure dust collector systems. Reliable performance in demanding baghouse filter cleaning applications.

products.name: Pneumatic Tie Rod Cylinder (ISO 15552) - CS4 Series
products.description: ISO 15552 standard pneumatic tie rod cylinder for industrial automation. Double acting with magnetic piston for position sensing. Available in multiple bore sizes.

products.name: Pneumatic Profile Cylinder Square Type (ISO 15552) - CS7 Series
products.description: Square profile pneumatic cylinder conforming to ISO 15552 standard. Space-efficient design with integrated sensors and adjustable cushioning.

products.name: Miniature Air Cylinder (ISO 6432) - MXC Series
products.description: Miniature pneumatic cylinder conforming to ISO 6432 standard for compact applications. Available with magnetic and non-magnetic piston options.

products.name: Compact Air Cylinder - CP Series
products.description: Short-stroke compact air cylinder for space-constrained applications. Ideal for clamping, positioning, and pushing operations in automation.

products.name: Compact Air Cylinder (ISO 21287) - CPX Series
products.description: ISO 21287 standard compact profile cylinder combining short stroke with high force output. Suitable for modern automated assembly and handling systems.

products.name: Miniature Cushion Air Cylinder (ISO 6432) - MCC Series
products.description: Miniature pneumatic cylinder with adjustable cushioning for smooth end-of-stroke deceleration. ISO 6432 standard with multiple mounting options.

products.name: Air Filter - PD Series
products.description: High-efficiency compressed air filter for removing water, oil, and particulate contamination. Protects pneumatic components and extends system life.

products.name: Air Regulator - PD Series
products.description: Precision air pressure regulator for maintaining consistent downstream pressure. Reliable performance with high flow capacity and pressure ranges.

products.name: Air Lubricator - PD Series
products.description: Automatic air line lubricator for injecting controlled amounts of oil into compressed air systems. Reduces wear on pneumatic components.

products.name: FRL Unit - PD Series
products.description: Combined filter, regulator, and lubricator unit for complete compressed air preparation. Modular design with easy maintenance and service.

products.name: Precision Regulator - PR Series
products.description: High-precision pressure regulator for applications requiring accurate pressure control. Suitable for instrumentation and critical process applications.

products.name: External Pilot Operated Diaphragm Valve (NC/NO) - ENN Series
products.description: External pilot operated diaphragm valve for agricultural and landscape irrigation systems. Reliable flow control with low pressure loss for large-scale irrigation.

products.name: 2 Way - 3 Way Direct Acting Pilot Solenoid Valve (NC/NO) - DAP Series
products.description: Direct acting pilot solenoid valve for irrigation control systems. Compact design for precise water management in drip and sprinkler irrigation.

products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Type Plastic Solenoid Valve with Flow Controller (NC) - PNN Series
products.description: Plastic diaphragm solenoid valve with integrated flow controller for irrigation. Corrosion-resistant design with adjustable flow rate for precise water management.

products.name: Straight Union - VO Series
products.description: One touch push-in straight fitting for quick and secure tube connections in pneumatic systems. Available in multiple tube diameters.

products.name: Union Elbow - VO Series
products.description: One touch push-in elbow fitting for space-saving 90-degree tube routing. Reliable connection with easy push-to-connect installation.

products.name: Union Tee - VO Series
products.description: One touch push-in tee fitting for branching tube lines. Equal flow distribution with secure push-in connections on all ports.

products.name: Male Connector - VO Series
products.description: One touch fitting with male thread for connecting pneumatic tubing to ports and equipment. BSPT and NPT thread options available.

products.name: Polyurethane Tubes - PU Series
products.description: Flexible polyurethane tubing for pneumatic systems. Excellent abrasion resistance and flexibility across wide temperature ranges.

products.name: Polyurethane Spiral Tube - PUS Series
products.description: Retractable polyurethane spiral tubing for moving applications. Self-coiling design prevents tangling and provides neat installation.

products.name: Nylon Tube - N1/N6 Series
products.description: Rigid nylon tubing for high-pressure pneumatic applications. Excellent burst strength and chemical resistance for demanding environments.

industries.name: Oil & Gas
industries.description: CLIVO provides rugged solenoid valves and actuators for upstream and downstream oil & gas operations. Butterfly valves for low-pressure loss and ball valves for high-pressure liquid and gas flow control.

industries.name: Power Generation Station
industries.description: Our control valves are applied in containment sampling systems, emergency core cooling systems, liquid radiation waste systems, and emergency generator systems in power plants.

industries.name: Food & Beverages
industries.description: Solenoid valves from CLIVO regulate various food processing equipment with precision and hygiene. Our valves ensure reliable flow control in food and beverage production lines.

industries.name: Chemical & Pharmaceuticals
industries.description: CLIVO provides a variety of stainless steel material robust solenoid valves for highly corrosive environments in chemical and pharmaceutical processing industries.

industries.name: Marine
industries.description: Directional control valves from CLIVO are applied in marine applications including horns, whistles, and engine room automation systems requiring reliable operation in harsh marine environments.

industries.name: Irrigation
industries.description: Our solenoid valves electromagnetically regulate the flow of water for efficient agricultural and landscape irrigation. Reliable automatic control for water conservation.

reasons: Product Development & Quality Improvement — product quality improvements at each and every level of production
Quality throughout the System — quality is built into our deliverables and internal operations
State of Art Facility — all products are manufactured in-house at our vertically integrated plant
Flexibility & Timely Shipment — accommodate last-minute additions and alterations in the order
Economies of Scale / Competitive price — producing products faster and at lower cost
Lean Manufacturing — focused on improving safety, quality, efficiency, and inventory turns
